payload.prompt: /patch Issue #1: No unit tests added for the new free-trial CTA filtering logic. The existing processCTAs test block in web-components/test/hydrate.test.js has no cases covering: (1) trial CTAs filtered on plans variants, (2) non-trial CTAs preserved on plans variants, (3) non-plans variants unaffected, or (4) empty-CTA-array edge case after filtering. Resolution: Add test cases to the processCTAs describe block in web-components/test/hydrate.test.js covering the four scenarios above. Severity: tech_debt
